title: Delete dead scripts, fix config, update gitignore
description: Delete dead scripts, remove unused deps, fix gitignore and zod transitive dependency

scope.in: Dead scripts deletion, package.json dep cleanup, .gitignore update, zod dependency fix

dod.criterion: cmdk removed, zod added to package.json

tasks.title: Delete confirmed dead script files
tasks.scope: Delete scripts/intelligence-trends.ts, scripts/intelligence-trends.js, scripts/intelligence-trends.d.ts, scripts/codex-proof.ts, scripts/find-gids.ts. These have zero imports anywhere in the codebase.

dod.criterion: All 5 dead script files deleted from scripts/
No remaining imports reference any of the deleted files (verified via grep)

tasks.title: Remove cmdk dep, add zod, update gitignore and tsconfig
tasks.scope: Remove cmdk from package.json dependencies. Add zod as explicit dependency (currently transitive from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk). Add dist-cli/ and dist-server/ to .gitignore. Remove intelligence-trends.ts from server/tsconfig.json include array. Run npm install to update lockfile.

dod.criterion: cmdk removed from package.json and package-lock.json
zod listed as explicit dependency in package.json
server/tsconfig.json no longer references deleted scripts
npm install succeeds and tsc --noEmit passes
